basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Upper age is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech/B.E. in all disciplines, M.Tech in relevant disciplines, M.Sc. Chemistry/Biotechnology/Agriculture and allied disciplines
qualification.details: First class with not less than 60% aggregate / 6.5 CGPA (on a 10-point scale) in B. Tech./B.E. in all disciplines and First class with not less than 60% aggregate / 6.5 CGPA (on a 10 point scale) in M.Tech in relevant disciplines or B. Tech/B.E. in all disciplines with at least a CGPA of 6.5/10 or 65% of marks or First class with not less than 60% aggregate / 6.5 CGPA (on a 10-point scale) M.Sc. Chemistry/Biotechnology/Agriculture and allied disciplines.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- per month + 16% HRA (JRF) or Rs. 25000/- per month + 16% HRA (Project Associate)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate Job 2026 N

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class B. Tech/B.E. in any discipline, or M.Tech in relevant disciplines, or M.Sc. in Chemistry/Biotechnology/Agriculture and allied disciplines with specific aggregate marks or CGPA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/ Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37000/- per month + 16% HRA for JRF and Rs. 25000/- per month + 16% HRA for Project Associate.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete bio-data and self-attested documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the MANIT Bhopal recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an offline or online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, at the Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal).
